Off Calendar Jun-11-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
*PETITIONER TIM JESSUP Amended Verified Petition For Peremptory Writ Of Mandate & Declaratory & Injunctive Relief; Exhibits In Support--DUPLICATE ENTRY.

For Peremptory Writ Of Mandate And For Declaratory And Injunctive Relief
Off Calendar Jun-11-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Martha Bridegam, Esq., Homeless Advocacy Project, 415-575-3130, for petitioner/moving party Tim Jessup.
Margaret Baumgartner, Deputy City Attorney, 415-554-4658, for respondent/opposing party CCSF.
*A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling -- PETITIONER TIM JESSUP'S MOTION For Peremptory Writ Of Mandate And For Declaratory And Injunctive Relief IS DENIED. Court approves petitioner's request pursuant to CCC 1094.5 for monetary reimbursement from respondent for transcript(that petitioner ordered for this hearing). ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Reporter: Joseph Vickstein, CSR #4780 DAG/301/EH)
